game.title: Ultimate Chicken Horse
game.description:
Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?

Wish granted!

Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends.

Key Features:
- Online and local play for up to 4 players
- Cross-platform play between PC, PS4, and Switch
- Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
- 15 levels with different features
- Build and share custom levels
- Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
- Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
- Customizable rule sets and game modes
- Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
- Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
- Fun, cartoony art style
- Sweet funky soundtrack

Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

localized_description.text:
Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?

Wish granted!

Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends.

Key Features:
- Online and local play for up to 4 players
- Cross-platform play between PC, PS4, and Switch
- Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
- 15 levels with different features
- Build and share custom levels
- Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
- Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
- Customizable rule sets and game modes
- Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
- Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
- Fun, cartoony art style
- Sweet funky soundtrack

Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

Join the Discord  
 
  关于游戏 幻想变身一匹会反弹跳、闪躲弓箭和设陷阱的小马，打败您的动物伙伴们，顺利闯过大家一起设置的障碍冒险关卡？
 
 愿望实现了！
 
 超级鸡马是一款玩家不断制造陷阱来妨碍对手到达终点的互动游戏，其中的关卡由您和好友一道设置。若您闯关成功而好友却未能通关，那么您将得分！无论是联机还是单机游戏，都能和您的动物朋友们一起挑战不同地点的各种关卡，与好友共同寻找开心玩乐的新方式。
 
    
 在 Discord 加入我们 关键特色   联机和单机游戏（最多 4 名玩家） 
   从脑洞大开的障碍设置到千方百计地顺利通关，游戏的每一步都充满独特的乐趣 
   18 个各具特色的关卡
   可自行建造关卡并分享
   可在挑战关卡与全球玩家同榜竞技，全平台参与
   各式各样的障碍物搭建出花样无限的关卡 
   可自定义规则和游戏模式
   共享控制器模式可让数名玩家用同一个控制器或键盘同时畅玩
   尝试小鸡、小马、绵羊、浣熊和其他奇妙的动物角色 
   欢乐无限的卡通风格 
   不容错过的超酷配乐
 
 请注意：本游戏主体是多人游戏。挑战关卡虽然可以单独创建和游玩，但要解锁角色和关卡，就需要通关主游戏模式（例如派对模式），而这些模式只有多人制的形式。

Join the Discord  
 
  關於此遊戲 幻想變身一匹會反彈跳、閃躲弓箭和設陷阱的小馬，打敗您的動物夥伴們，順利闖過大家一起設置的障礙冒險關卡？
 
 願望實現了！
 
 超級雞馬是一款玩家不斷製造陷阱來妨礙對手到達終點的互動遊戲，其中的關卡由您和好友一道設置。若您闖關成功而好友卻未能通關，那麼您將得分！無論是聯機還是單機遊戲，都能和您的動物朋友們一起挑戰不同地點的各種關卡，與好友共同尋找開心玩樂的新方式。
 
    
 在 Discord 加入我們 關鍵特色   聯機和單機遊戲（最多 4 名玩家） 
   從腦洞大開的障礙設置到千方百計地順利通關，遊戲的每一步都充滿獨特的樂趣 
   13 個各具特色的關卡
   可自行建造關卡並分享
   可在挑戰關卡與全球玩家同榜競技，全平台參與
   各式各樣的障礙物搭建出花樣無限的關卡 
   可自訂規則和遊戲模式
   在共用控制器模式下，數名玩家可用同一個控制器或鍵盤同時暢玩
   嘗試小雞、小馬、綿羊、浣熊和其他奇妙的動物角色 
   歡樂無限的卡通風格 
   不容錯過的超酷配樂
 
 請注意：本遊戲以多人遊戲為主。單人雖然可以創建和遊玩挑戰關卡，但要解鎖角色和關卡，就需要通關其中一種主遊戲模式（例如派對模式），而這些模式只有多人制的形式。

  About the Game Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?
 
 Wish Granted!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends. Key Features   Online, cross-platform, and local play for up to 4 players
   Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
   21 levels with different features

   Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
   Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels

Join the Discord  
 
  Acerca del juego ¿Alguna vez has deseado ser un caballo trepamuros, esquivaflechas y colocador de trampas superando a tus peludos amigos en una carrera cargada de peligros en una pista que todos construís juntos?
 
 ¡Deseo concedido!
 
 Caballo Pollo Definitivo es un juego festivo de plataformas en el que tú y tus amigos construís el nivel mientras vais jugando, colocando trampas mortales antes de intentar alcanzar el final del nivel. Si lo consigues y tus amigos no ¡sumas puntos! Juega online o en local con tus amigos peludos y experimenta con una gran variedad de plataformas en todo tipo de ubicaciones variopintas para encontrar nuevas maneras de fastidiar a tus amigos.
 
    
 Únete a nosotros en Discord. Características clave:   Juego online y local para hasta 4 jugadores
   Dinámica de juego única, desde la colocación estratégica de los bloques a un control enloquecido de las plataformas
   13 niveles con diferentes funciones
   Construye y comparte niveles personalizados
   Compite por los mejores tiempos globales en niveles de desafío a través de todas las plataformas
   Gran librería de bloques para crear una variedad ilimitada de niveles
   Modos de juego y reglas personalizables
   Modo controlador compartido para jugar al multijugador con un mando o teclado
   Juega como un pollo, un caballo, una oveja, un mapache y otros magníficos animales
   Divertido estilo animado
   Una preciosa banda sonora funky
 
 Recuerda: Esto es, principalmente, un juego multijugador. Se pueden crear niveles de desafío y jugar en solitario, pero al desbloquear personajes y niveles hay que jugar en uno de los modos de juego principales (como el modo Fiesta), que solo funcionan en multijugador.

Join the Discord  
 
  À propos du jeu N'avez-vous jamais rêvé d'être un cheval capable de sauter sur les murs, de tirer des flèches, de poser des pièges et de prendre le dessus sur vos amis animaux lors d'une course d'obstacles pleine de dangers que vous imaginez ensemble ? 
 
 Et bien votre vœu est exaucé ! 
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse est un jeu de plateformes festif permettant à vos amis et à vous-même de construire le niveau tout en jouant, et de placer des pièges mortels avant de tenter d'atteindre la fin du niveau. Si vous y parvenez alors que vos amis n'y parviennent pas, vous remportez un point ! Jouez en ligne ou en local avec vos copains animaux et découvrez une large palette de plateformes dans toutes sortes d'endroits étranges vous offrant de nouveaux moyens de faire la bringue avec vos amis.
 
    
 Rejoignez-nous sur Discord Fonctionnalités principales   Jeu en ligne et local jusqu’à quatre joueurs
   Déroulement unique allant du placement stratégique de blocs au jeu de plateformes aux contrôles pointus
   18 niveaux aux fonctionnalités diverses
   Construisez et partagez vos niveaux personnalisés
   Affrontez-vous pour battre des records dans les niveaux Défi sur toutes les plateformes
   Énorme bibliothèque de blocs permettant de créer une infinité de niveaux
   Règles et modes de jeu personnalisables
   Mode Partage de manette pour jouer en multijoueur avec un clavier ou une manette 
   Incarnez un poulet, un cheval, un mouton, un raton laveur et d'autres animaux merveilleux 
   Graphismes fun et cartoonesques 
   Chouette bande-son funky
 
 Remarque : ce jeu est essentiellement multijoueur. Vous pourrez créer des niveaux Défi et y jouer seul, mais pour débloquer personnages et niveaux vous devrez jouer à l’un des modes principaux (comme le mode Party) qui sont exclusivement multijoueur.

Join the Discord  
 
  Infos zum Spiel Du wolltest schon immer mal ein springendes, sich vor Pfeilen duckendes, fallenstellendes Pferd sein, das seine Tierfreunde in einem Rennen durch einen risikoreichen Hindernislauf, den du selbst zusammengebaut hast, besiegt?
 
 Wunsch erfüllt!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse ist ein Jump’n’Run-Spiel, bei dem du und deine Freunde während des Spiels das Level baut und tödliche Fallen platziert, um dann das Ziel zu erreichen. Wenn du dies schaffst, deine Freunde aber nicht, dann erhältst du Punkte. Spiele online oder mit deinen Freunde vor Ort und experimentiere mit einer großen Auswahl an Plattformen und verrückten Orten und finde immer neue Wege um deine Freunde in den Wahnsinn und den sicheren Tod zu treiben.
 
    
 Spiele auf Discord Wichtigste Merkmale   Online  und Offline-Spiel für bis zu 4 Spieler
   einzigartiges Spielerlebnis, von strategischen Blockplatzierungen zu dynamischen Plattformen
   18 verschiedene Level
   baue eigene Level und spiele sie gemeinsam mit anderen
   plattformübergreifende Herausforderungs-Level und Bestenlisten
   große Sammlung an Blocks zur Erschaffung von unterschiedlichen Levels
   individuell anpassbare Regeln und Spielmodi
   Modus mit geteiltem Controller, damit Multiplayer-Spiele auch mit einem Controller oder einer Tastatur möglich sind
   Spiele als Huhn, Pferd, Schaf oder als ein anderes tolles Tier
   lustige, cartoonartige Grafik
   cooler Soundtrack
 
 Hinweis: Dies ist vor allem als Multiplayer-Spiel gedacht. Herausforderungs-Level können auch alleine erstellt und gespielt werden, aber neue Figuren und Level können nur in den Haupt-Multiplayer-Spielmodi (zum Beispiel Party-Modus) erreicht werden.

Join the Discord  
 
  Acerca do jogo Já desejou ser um cavalo que salta por paredes, se esquiva de flechas e faz armadilhas, superando seus amigos animais numa corrida por uma pista de obstáculos que todos vocês criaram juntos?
 
 Desejo concedido!
 
 O Ultimate Chicken Horse é um jogo de plataforma coletivo, no qual você e seus amigos criam a fase enquanto jogam, colocando armadilhas mortais antes de tentar chegar ao fim da fase. Se você conseguir, mas seus amigos não, você marca pontos! Jogue online ou localmente com seus companheiros animais e teste uma ampla variedade de plataformas em todos os tipos de lugares para encontrar novas formas de provocar seus amigos.
 
    
 Junte-se a nós no Discord Principais características   Jogo online e local para até 4 jogadores
   Fluxo de jogo único, de posicionamento de blocos à plataforma controlada por interruptores
   18 fases com diferentes características 
   Crie e compartilhe fases personalizadas
   Compita pelos melhores tempos mundiais em fases de desafio em todas as plataformas
   Imensa biblioteca de blocos para criar uma variedade infinita de fases
   Conjunto de regras e modos de jogos personalizáveis
   Modo de controle compartilhado para vários jogadores, com um controle ou teclado
   Jogue como o Galinha, o Cavalo, a Ovelha, o Guaxinim e outros animais maravilhosos
   Arte divertida, no estilo cartum
   Trilha sonora divertida
 
 Atenção: esse é um jogo essencialmente multijogador As fases de desafio podem ser criadas e jogadas em modo solo, mas para desbloquear os personagens e fases é necessário jogar um dos modos principais (como o modo Balada) que são apenas multijogador.

Join the Discord  
 
  ゲームについて 仲間たちと一緒に構築した危険が満載の障害物コースで、壁を飛び越えたり、矢をかわしたり、罠を仕掛けたりしつつ、動物の友達と競争し彼らを出し抜き、レースをする馬になりたいと考えたことはありますか？
 
 その願いは叶います！
 
 アルティメイトチキンホースは、ステージの最後に到達しようとする前に致命的なトラップを仕掛けながら、あなたと友達でプレイしながらそのステージを構築していくパーティープラットフォーマーです。あなたが最後まで到達できて、友達ができない場合、あなたはポイントを獲得します！あなたの動物の友達とオンラインまたはローカルでプレイして、あらゆる種類の奇妙な場所にある多様なプラットフォームで実験し、友達をじゃまする新しい方法を見つけてください。
 
    
 Discordから参加してください
 
   オンラインとローカルで最大プレイヤー4人までプレイ
   戦略的なブロック配置からツイッチコントロールプラットフォームまで、ユニークなゲームの流れ 
   特徴が異なる18ステージ
   カスタムステージを作成そしてシェア
   チャレンジステージでは、全てのゲーム機種を通してグローバル・ベストタイムを競える
   無限に幅広いステージを作成するための巨大なブロックライブラリー 
   ルールやゲームモードをカスタマイズ可能
   コントローラー・シェアモードで、一つのコントローラーまたはキーボードを使い、マルチプレイヤーで遊べる
   鶏、馬、羊、および他の素晴らしい動物としてプレイ 
   楽しいアニメのようなアートスタイル 
   グルービーでファンキーなサウンドトラック

 O Ultimate Chicken Horse é um jogo de plataforma coletivo, no qual você e seus amigos criam a fase enquanto jogam, colocando armadilhas mortais antes de tentar chegar ao fim da fase. Se você conseguir, mas seus amigos não, você marca pontos! Jogue online ou localmente com seus companheiros animais e teste uma ampla variedade de plataformas em todos os tipos de lugares para encontrar novas formas de provocar seus amigos. Principais características   Jogo online e local para até 4 jogadores
   Fluxo de jogo único, de posicionamento de blocos à plataforma controlada por interruptores
   18 fases com diferentes características 
   Crie e compartilhe fases personalizadas
   Compita pelos melhores tempos mundiais em fases de desafio em todas as plataformas
   Imensa biblioteca de blocos para criar uma variedade infinita de fases
   Conjunto de regras e modos de jogos personalizáveis
   Modo de controle compartilhado para vários jogadores, com um controle ou teclado
   Jogue como o Galinha, o Cavalo, a Ovelha, o Guaxinim e outros animais maravilhosos
   Arte divertida, no estilo cartum
   Trilha sonora divertida    Atenção: esse é um jogo essencialmente multijogador As fases de desafio podem ser criadas e jogadas em modo solo, mas para desbloquear os personagens e fases é necessário jogar um dos modos principais (como o modo Balada) que são apenas multijogador.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!  Our upcoming bike-racing party game, releasing Winter 2025!
 
       
 
  Om spillet Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?
 
 Wish Granted!
 
 Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends. Key Features   Online, cross-platform, and local play for up to 4 players
   Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
   21 levels with different features 
   Build and share custom levels
   Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
   Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
   Customizable rule sets and game modes
   Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
   Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
   Fun, cartoony art style
   Sweet funky soundtrack   Please note:  this is primarily a multiplayer game . Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

Wishlist Ultimate Sheep Raccoon!        
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Hai mai desiderato sfidare i tuo amici saltando da un muro all’altro, schivando frecce e piazzando trappole nei panni di un cavallo in un percorso ad ostacoli irto di pericoli che voi stessi avete costruito? Desiderio esaudito! Ultimate Chicken Horse è un platformer di gruppo dove tu e i tuoi amici potete costrure i livelli in cui giocare, piazzando trappole mortali prima di cimentarvi nella corsa. Se tu ce la fai ma i tuoi amici no, fai punti! Gioca online o in locale con i tuoi amici animali e sperimenta una vasta gamma di piattaforme in ogni sorta di strano paesaggio per trovare nuovi modi di far arrabbiare i tuoi amici. Caratteristiche principali   Gioco locale e online fino a 4 giocatori
   Stile di gioco unico, dal posizionamento strategico dei blocchi al frenetico platforming 
   18 livelli con caratteristiche diverse
   Costruisci e condividi i livelli personalizzati
   Competi per i tempi migliori globali nei livelli di sfida attraverso tutte le piattaforme
   Vasta scelta di blocchi per creare un’infinita varietà di livelli 
   Set di regole e modalità di gioco personalizzabili
   Modalità di condivisione del controller per giocare in multigiocatore con un controller o la tastiera
   Gioca nei panni di un pollo, un cavallo, una pecora, un procione e altri fantastici animali 
   Design buffo e cartoonesco 
   Colonna sonora originale e divertente    Avviso: questo gioco è principalmente per multigiocatore. I livelli di sfida possono essere creati e giocati da soli, ma per sbloccare i personaggi e i livelli è richiesto di giocare a una delle modalità di gioco principali (come la modalità Party) che sono solo per multigiocatore.

game.brief:
Ever wish you were a wall-jumping, arrow-dodging, trap-setting horse, besting your animal pals in a race through a peril-laden obstacle course that you all built together?

Wish granted!

Ultimate Chicken Horse is a party platformer where you and your friends build the level as you play, placing deadly traps before trying to reach the end of the level. If you can make it but your friends can't, you score points! Play online or locally with your animal buddies and experiment with a wide variety of platforms in all sorts of strange locations to find new ways to mess with your friends.

Key Features:
- Online and local play for up to 4 players
- Cross-platform play between PC, PS4, and Switch
- Unique game flow, from strategic block placement to twitch control platforming
- 15 levels with different features
- Build and share custom levels
- Compete for global best times on Challenge levels across all platforms
- Huge library of blocks to create an infinite variety of levels
- Customizable rule sets and game modes
- Shared controller mode to play multiplayer with one controller or keyboard
- Play as a chicken, horse, sheep, raccoon and other wonderful animals
- Fun, cartoony art style
- Sweet funky soundtrack

Please note: this is primarily a multiplayer game. Challenge levels can be created and played alone, but unlocking characters and levels requires playing one of the main game modes (like Party Mode) which are only multiplayer.

game.title: Little Nightmares
game.description:
Little Nightmares is a puzzle-platform horror adventure game developed by Tarsier Studios and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment. Set in a mysterious world, Little Nightmares follows the journey of Six, a hungry little girl who must escape the Maw, an iron vessel inhabited by monstrous, twisted beings.

Little Nightmares follows Six, a small, raincoat-clad child trapped in a mysterious underwater vessel called the Maw. The Maw is inhabited by grotesque, monstrous residents who prey on the helpless. As Six navigates through disturbing environments, she must solve puzzles and avoid being captured. The journey gradually reveals the dark and oppressive nature of the Maw and its inhabitants. Driven by hunger and desperation, Six’s actions ultimately reflect the cycle of predation within the world she inhabits.

game.title: V Rising
game.description:
Experience a Vampire Survival Action RPG adventure like no other. 
 
 Awaken as a weakened Vampire after centuries of slumber. Hunt for blood to regain your strength while hiding from the scorching sun to survive. Rebuild your castle and convert humans into your loyal servants in a quest to raise your Vampire empire. Make allies or enemies online or play solo locally, fend off holy soldiers, and wage war in a world of conflict.  Seize your destiny! Defy Dracula! Rule the night!
 
 Now with native gamepad support and a reimagined interface, prepare for action-packed, hands-on gameplay!
 
   A Gothic Open-World  
 Explore a vast world teeming with mythical horrors and danger. Travel through lush forests, open countryside, and dark caverns to discover valuable resources, meeting friends and foes alike along the way. Traverse the world with vampire comrades or hunt solo as you pillage villages, raid bandits, and delve into the domains of supernatural beasts. 
 
   Fear the light - Rule the night  
 Stick to the shadows during the daytime, or the burning sunlight will turn you to ashes. Roam the night and prey on your victims in the darkness. As a vampire, you must quench your thirst for blood while planning your strategies around the rising and setting sun.
 
   Raise your Castle  
 Gather resources and discover ancient techniques to uncover forgotten knowledge. Use your newly acquired insight to build a castle to store your loot and grow your army of darkness. Personalize your domain, exhibit your vampiric style, and make sure to craft coffins for servants and friends. Strengthen your castle to protect your treasure hoard from vampire rivals.
 
   Compete or Cooperate  
 Travel alone or explore the world with friends. Fighting side by side with other Vampires will give you an advantage in the fight to conquer the greatest threats of Vardoran. Raid other players’ castles, play the diplomat in the game of blood, power, and betrayal, or craft an indomitable retinue of insidious allies. Compete or cooperate - the choice is yours.
 
   Master your Vampire 
 Learn and master an arsenal of deadly weapons and unholy abilities. In V Rising, you aim skillshots and dodge projectiles using​ precise​​ ​WASD controls ​and cursor-based​ ​aiming - no click to move. Tailor your vampire to fit your play style by combining weapons with a variety of spells earned through vanquishing powerful foes. Find and master your personal, perfect blend of sword and sorcery to become the ultimate nocturnal predator!

Find and master your personal, perfect blend of sword and sorcery to become the ultimate nocturnal predator!

Una Experiencia de Supervivencia Vampírica 
 
 Despierta siendo un vampiro debilitado tras siglos de letargo. Parte de cacería en busca de sangre para recuperar tu fuerza, a la par vez que te escondes de la abrasadora luz solar. Reconstruye tu castillo y transforma a humanos en tus leales sirvientes en una misión para alzar tu imperio vampírico. Haz aliados o enemigos jugando en linea o juega sólo, desafiando a soldados sagrados y batallando en la guerra de un mundo sumido en conflicto.
 
 ¿Serás tú quien se alce como el próximo Drácula? Un mundo abierto de estilo Gótico  
 Explora un vasto mundo a rebosar de horrores mitólogicos y peligro.Viaja a través de exhuberantes bosques, grandes campos rurales y oscuras cavernas para descubrir valiosos recursos, haciendo tanto amigos, como enemigos en el camino. Adentrate en este mundo junto a tus camaradas vampíricos o sé el cazador solitario mientras saqueas aldeas, asaltas a bandidos y te adentras en los dominios de bestias sobrenaturales.
 
   Teme la luz - Regenta la noche  
 Permanece en las sombras durante el día, o la abrasadora luz del sol te reducirá a cenizas. Merodea durante la noche y acecha a tus víctimas en la oscuridad. Como vampiro, debes saciar tu sed de sangre mientras planeas que estrategias llevar a cabo durante el día o la noche.
 
   Alza tu castillo  
 Recolecta recursos y descubre técnicas ancestrales para obtener poderes oscuros. Usa los conocimientos adquiridos para construir un castillo donde poder atesorar tu botín y alzar tu ejército de las tinieblas. Personaliza tu dominio, exhibe tu estilo vampírico y asegúrate de crear ataúdes para el reposo de tus sirvientes y amigos. Fortalece tu castillo y proteje tus preciados tesoros de vampiros rivales.
   Compite o Coopera  
 Viaja en solitario o explora el mundo junto a tus amigos. Luchar codo con codo junto a otros vampiros te dará la ventaja para conquistar las mayores amenazas de Vardorant. Asedia los castillos de otros jugadores o toma el camino diplomático en un juego de sangre, poder y traición. Compite o coopera- La elección está en tus manos.
 
   Domina a tu Vampiro 
 Aprende y domina un arsenal de armas mortíferas y poderes impíos. En V Rising apuntas tus "skill-shots" con el cursor del ratón y esquivas proyectiles usando precisos controles WASD, sin movimiento por click. Personaliza tu vapiro a la medida de tu estilo de juego al combinar armas con una variedad de hechizos obtenidos al derrotar poderosos enemigos. Domina tus habilidades y desata tus poderes malignos.

Une expérience de survie de vampire 
 
 Réveille toi dans la peau d'un vampire affaibli après des siècles de sommeil. Chasse le sang pour retrouver tes forces tout en se cachant du soleil brûlant pour survivre. Reconstruis ton château et convertis les humains en loyaux serviteurs dans une quête pour élever ton empire vampirique. Fais toi des alliés ou des ennemis en ligne ou joue solo en local, repousse les soldats saints, et fais la guerre dans un monde de conflit. 
 
 Deviendras-tu le prochain Dracula ? Un monde ouvert gothique  
 Explore un vaste monde rempli d’horreurs mythiques et de dangers. Parcours les forêts luxuriantes, la campagne et les cavernes sombres pour découvrir des ressources précieuses, rencontre des amis et des ennemis en cours de route. Traverse le monde avec des camarades vampires ou chasse en solo pour piller des villages, attaquer des bandits et plonger dans les domaines des bêtes surnaturelles.
 
   Craignez la lumière - Dominez la nuit  
 Reste dans l’ombre pendant la journée, ou la lumière du soleil te transformera en cendres. Erre dans la nuit et attaque tes victimes dans l’obscurité. En tant que vampire, tu dois étancher ta soif de sang tout en planifiant tes stratégies en fonction du jour et de la nuit.
 
   Bâtis votre château  
 Rassemble des ressources et découvre d’anciennes techniques pour acquérir des pouvoirs obscurs. Utilise tes connaissances nouvellement acquises pour construire un château où tu pourras stocker ton butin et faire croître ton armée de ténèbres. Personnalise ton domaine, exhibe ton style vampirique et assure-toi de fabriquer des cercueils pour tes serviteurs et tes amis. Renforce ton château pour protéger ton trésor de vampires rivaux.
 
   Rivaliser ou coopérer  
 Voyage seul ou explore le monde avec des amis. Combattre côte à côte avec d’autres vampires te donnera un avantage dans le combat pour conquérir les plus grandes menaces de Vardoran. Attaque les châteaux des autres joueurs ou joue au diplomate dans un jeu de sang, de pouvoir et de trahison. Rivalise ou coopére - le choix t'appartiens.
 
   Maîtrise ton vampire 
 Apprends et maîtrise un arsenal d’armes mortelles et de capacités impies. Dans V Rising, tu vises avec adresse et esquive des projectiles en utilisant des contrôles ZQSD précis et la visée au curseur - pas de clic pour se déplacer. Adapte ton vampire à ton style de jeu en combinant des armes avec une variété de sorts gagnés en vainquant de puissants ennemis. Maîtrise tes talents et déchaîne tes cruels pouvoirs.

Ein Vampir-Survival-Erlebnis 
 
 Erwache als geschwächter Vampir nach einem jahrhundertelangem Schlummer. Jage nach Blut, um deine Kräfte wiederzuerlangen, und verstecke dich vor der sengenden Sonne, um zu überleben. Baue dein Schloss wieder auf und verwandle Menschen in deine treuen Diener, um dein Vampirimperium zu vergrößern. Finde online Verbündete oder spiele lokal alleine, wehre heilige Soldaten ab und führe Krieg in einer Welt voller Konflikte.
 
 Wirst du der nächste Dracula werden?
 
  Eine Gothic-Open-World 
 
 Erforsche eine riesige Welt voller mythischer Schrecken und Gefahren. Reise durch üppige Wälder, offene Landstriche und dunkle Höhlen, um wertvolle Ressourcen zu entdecken, und begegne dabei Freunden und Feinden gleichermaßen. Durchquere die Welt mit Vampirkameraden oder jage allein, während du Dörfer plünderst, Banditen überfällst und in die Gefilde übernatürlicher Bestien eindringst.
 
  
 
  Fürchte das Licht – beherrsche die Nacht 
 
 Halte dich tagsüber im Schatten auf, oder das brennende Sonnenlicht wird dich in Asche verwandeln. Durchstreife die Nacht und jage deine Opfer in der Dunkelheit. Als Vampir musst du deinen Blutdurst stillen und gleichzeitig deine Strategien für die Tages- und Nachtzeit planen.
 
  
 
  Errichte dein Schloss 
 
 Sammle Ressourcen und entdecke uralte Techniken, um dunkle Kräfte zu erlangen. Nutze dein neu erworbenes Wissen, um ein Schloss zu bauen, in dem du deine Beute aufbewahren und deine Armee der Finsternis vergrößern kannst. Gestalte dein Reich individuell, zeige deinen vampirischen Stil und stelle Särge für deine Diener und Freunde her. Verstärke dein Schloss, um deinen Reichtum vor den Vampir-Rivalen zu schützen.
 
  
 
  Konkurrieren oder kooperieren 
 
 Reise allein oder erkunde die Welt mit Freunden. Wenn du Seite an Seite mit anderen Vampiren kämpfst, hast du einen Vorteil im Kampf gegen die größten Bedrohungen Vardorans. Plündere die Schlösser anderer Spieler oder spiele den Diplomaten in einem Spiel um Blut, Macht und Verrat. Konkurriere oder kooperiere – du hast die Wahl.
 
  
 
  Meistere deinen Vampir 
 
 Lerne und meistere ein Arsenal tödlicher Waffen und unheiliger Fähigkeiten. In V Rising verschießt du deine Skillshots mit der präzisen WASD-Steuerung und dem cursorbasierten Zielen und weichst Geschossen aus – kein Klicken zum Bewegen nötig. Passe deinen Vampir an deinen Spielstil an, indem du Waffen mit einer Vielzahl von Zaubern kombinierst, die du dir durch das Besiegen mächtiger Feinde verdient hast. Meistere deine Fähigkeiten und entfessle deine bösen Kräfte.

 Gather resources and discover ancient techniques to uncover forgotten knowledge. Use your newly acquired insight to build a castle to store your loot and grow your army of darkness. Personalize your domain, exhibit your vampiric style, and make sure to craft coffins for servants and friends. Strengthen your castle to protect your treasure hoard from vampire rivals.
 
   Compete or Cooperate  
 Travel alone or explore the world with friends. Fighting side by side with other Vampires will give you an advantage in the fight to conquer the greatest threats of Vardoran. Raid other players’ castles, play the diplomat in the game of blood, power, and betrayal, or craft an indomitable retinue of insidious allies. Compete or cooperate - the choice is yours.
 
   Master your Vampire 
 Learn and master an arsenal of deadly weapons and unholy abilities. In V Rising, you aim skillshots and dodge projectiles using​ precise​​ ​WASD controls ​and cursor-based​ ​aiming - no click to move. Tailor your vampire to fit your play style by combining weapons with a variety of spells earned through vanquishing powerful foes. Find and master your personal, perfect blend of sword and sorcery to become the ultimate nocturnal predator!

Experience a Vampire Survival Action RPG adventure like no other. 
 
 Awaken as a weakened Vampire after centuries of slumber. Hunt for blood to regain your strength while hiding from the scorching sun to survive. Rebuild your castle and convert humans into your loyal servants in a quest to raise your Vampire empire. Make allies or enemies online or play solo locally, fend off holy soldiers, and wage war in a world of conflict.  Seize your destiny! Defy Dracula! Rule the night!
 
 Now with native gamepad support and a reimagined interface, prepare for action-packed, hands-on gameplay!
 
   A Gothic Open-World  
 Explore a vast world teeming with mythical horrors and danger. Travel through lush forests, open countryside, and dark caverns to discover valuable resources, meeting friends and foes alike along the way. Traverse the world with vampire comrades or hunt solo as you pillage villages, raid bandits, and delve into the domains of supernatural beasts.

Awaken as a vampire. Hunt for blood in nearby settlements to regain your strength and evade the scorching sun to survive. Raise your castle and thrive in an ever-changing open world full of mystery. Gain allies online and conquer the land of the living.

A Vampire Survival Experience

Awaken as a weakened vampire after centuries of slumber. Hunt for blood in nearby settlements to regain your strength while hiding from the scorching sun to survive. Rebuild your castle and convert humans into your loyal servants in a quest to raise your vampire empire. Make allies online, fend off holy soldiers, and wage war against other players in a world of conflict.

Will you become the next Dracula?

game.title: A Little to the Left
game.description: A Little To The Left is a cozy puzzle game that has you sort, stack, and organize household items into pleasing arrangements while you keep an eye out for a mischievous cat with an inclination for chaos. Check out this playful and intuitive puzzler with 75+ satisfying messes to tidy.

localized_description.text: A Little To The Left is a cozy puzzle game that has you sort, stack, and organize household items into pleasing arrangements while you keep an eye out for a mischievous cat with an inclination for chaos. Check out this playful and intuitive puzzler with 75+ satisfying messes to tidy.

《往左一点》是一款整理类益智游戏，玩家要对家居物品进行分类、叠放和排列，使它们各居其位，但要注意里面有只淘气猫咪喜欢捣乱！
  
  
 
   谜题隐藏在家居用品中
   谜题的设计既直观又惬意，解决方法也多种多样
   “每日整理投递”每天都会给你送去一道独一无二的谜题
   游戏非常适合休闲益智游戏迷，以及能够从井井有条的空间中获得满足感的人
   随心所欲地通过“随它”选项跳过关卡，然后选择何时再来处理某些混乱谜题
   需要提示？少许还是大量？借助独一无二的提示系统，你可以控制每一关中解决方案的透露程度。  
  
 
 时钟的指针应该指向哪个方向？鸡蛋要如何排列？是谁在水果上贴了这么多贴纸？！？
 加入游戏即可畅享一个宁静的世界，每个角落都有令人惊喜、考验观察力的益智游戏。
 《往左一点》中处处是迷人的插图和惊艳的场景，超过100个赏心悦目的谜题等你来发现，让好奇心得到彻底的满足。不过要留意那只喜欢把东西弄乱的淘气猫喔！
  
  
 
 在“每日整理”模式中，你每天都会收到一道谜题，是根据我们最喜爱的谜题专为你改编而成。
 每天找出所有解决方法就能赢得有趣的徽章！要是在现实生活中进行整理也有这样的奖励就好啦。
  
  
 
 想在七月里享受节日的快乐？抑或是在五月里感受到恐怖？
 《向左一点》现已推出谜题档案，能够回味此前的限时应季关卡。现在无论是几月，都能畅玩关于圣诞节、复活节、万圣节等各项主题的混乱谜题。 特色：   100多个独特的逻辑谜题
   能够快速解决的谜题，带来满意的游戏体验
   直观的拖放控制方式
   “每日整理投递”每天都会给你送去一道独一无二的谜题
   解决方法多种多样
   插图充满魅力
   氛围感十足的配乐
   淘气（但十分可爱）的猫咪
   搞笑又好玩，完美适合所有年龄段！

「《靠左一些些》(A Little to the Left) 是一個有條有理的益智遊戲，請玩家將家中的各種物品分類、堆疊、整理得恰到好處，還有一隻調皮的貓，喜歡出其不意地搞破壞！
  
  
 
   謎題就暗藏在家中的物品裡
   多種解法，設計上符合直觀且又療癒
   「每日宅配整理任務」(The Daily Tidy Delivery) 每天為您特別出一個謎題
   格外適合偏好輕鬆解謎遊戲的玩家，和置身於有條不紊的空間會感到十分舒暢的人士
   可按照您的意思使用「隨它去」選項跳過關卡，自己決定何時想要挑戰某些混亂場面
   需要提示？那您想要一點點，還是很多呢？本遊戲採取獨特的提示系統，由您自行掌控每一關透露多大程度的解方。   
  
 
 時鐘的指針應該朝哪個方向？雞蛋該如何排列？是誰在水果上黏這麼多貼紙？！
 快進入這個令人賞心悅目的益智遊戲，享受使人平靜，又小巧思無所不在的驚奇世界。
 《靠左一些些》有特别精美的插圖和別出心裁的情境，不僅帶來滿足感，還有超過 100 種好玩的謎題待您發現。對了，請留意一隻頑皮的貓咪，牠特別喜歡搗蛋！
  
  
 
 「每日整理」模式中每天會為您出一道題，是我們從最愛的謎題精選，經過特別為您更動而成。
 每天找到全部解答，可贏得趣味徽章！要是現實生活之中整理家務有這麼高的回報，該有多好。
  
  
 
 想要享受七月的應景歡樂嗎？到了五月，格外覺得膽戰心驚嗎？
 《靠左一些些》即日起設置了歷史謎題庫，讓玩家能夠永久性地取用原先限時的季節性關卡。今起您可享受環繞聖誕節、復活節、萬聖節等等節日的凌亂環境，不分當時的月份。 特色：   超過 100 種獨特的邏輯性謎題
   能快速解出的謎題，玩起來充滿成就感
   直觀性的拖放控制方式
   「每日宅配整理任務」每天為您送上獨一無二的任務
   多種解方
   畫面美感十足
   氣氛濃厚的配樂
   調皮（但非常可愛）的貓咪
   有趣又好玩，老少咸宜！

Sort, stack, and organize household objects into just the right spot in A Little to the Left, a tidy puzzle game with a mischievous cat who likes to shake things up!
  
  
 
   Puzzles hidden among household objects
   Multiple solutions make for intuitive and satisfying puzzle design
   A puzzle unique for you every day with The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Perfect for casual puzzle game fans and those who get a jolt of satisfaction from a well organized space
   Feel free to skip levels with the "Let It Be" option, and choose when you want to tackle certain messes
   Need a hint? A little or a lot? With a unique hint system, you control how much of the solution is revealed in each level.  
  
  
 Which way should the clock hands point? How to arrange the eggs? Who put so many stickers on this fruit?!?
 Come enjoy a calming world in an observational puzzle game with surprises around every corner.
 Featuring charming illustrations and surprising scenarios, A Little to the Left is satisfying and curious with over 100 delightful puzzles to discover. Keep your eye out for a mischievous cat who has an inclination for chaos!
  
  
 
 In the Daily Tidy mode, you’ll get a puzzle delivered EVERY DAY with variations on our favorite puzzles that’s unique to you.
 Find all the solutions each day to earn fun badges! If only tidying in real life was this rewarding.
 
  
  
 Want that festive joy in July? Feeling like a fright in May?
 A Little to the Left now features a puzzle Archive, granting permanent access to the formerly limited-time seasonal levels. Now enjoy messes based around Xmas, Easter, Halloween, and more, no matter the month. FEATURES:   Over 100 unique logical puzzles
   Quick-to-solve puzzles make for satisfying gameplay
   Intuitive drag and drop controls
   A puzzle unique to you delivered each day with The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Multiple solutions
   Charming illustration
   Atmospheric sound design
   A mischievous (but very cute) cat
   Funny and playful, great for all ages!

¡Clasifica, apila y organiza objetos del hogar en su lugar en A Little to the Left, un juego de puzles con un travieso gatito al que le gusta darte un poco de vidilla!
  
  
 
   Puzles escondidos entre objetos de la casa.
   Como tienen varias soluciones, su diseño es intuitivo y satisfactorio.
   Un puzle exclusivo para tu día a día con tu número de El Diario del Orden.
   Perfecto para los amantes de los puzles casuales y para quienes el orden les llena de satisfacción.
   Sáltate niveles libremente con la opción para dejarlo estar y elige cuándo quieres ocuparte de determinados desórdenes.
   ¿Necesitas una pista? ¿Grande o pequeña? Gracias al exclusivo sistema de pistas, controlas la cantidad de la solución que se revelará en cada nivel.   
  
 
 ¿En qué dirección deberían apuntar las manecillas del reloj? ¿Cómo ordenar los huevos? ¿¡A quién se le ocurrió ponerle tantas pegatinas a esta fruta!?
 Ven a disfrutar de un mundo relajante con un juego de puzles de observación y sorpresas a cada paso.
 Con preciosas ilustraciones y escenarios sorprendentes, A Little to the Left es un título satisfactorio e interesante con más de 100 puzles geniales para descubrir. ¡Y ojo con el travieso gatito, que tiende a sembrar el caos!
  
  
 
 CADA DÍA recibirás una versión de uno de tus puzles favoritos exclusiva para ti con tu edición de El Diario del Orden.
 ¡Encuentra todas las soluciones cada día para conseguir emblemas divertidos! Ojalá ordenar fuera así de gratificante en la vida real.
  
  
 
 ¿Quieres saltar de alegría en julio? ¿Mayo te agota?
 A Little to the Left ahora incluye un archivo de puzles con en el que podrás acceder de forma permanente a los niveles de temporada que antes tenían una duración limitada. Disfruta ya de los revoltijos de temática navideña, de Semana Santa, Halloween y más, sea el mes que sea. CARACTERÍSTICAS:   Más de 100 puzles lógicos únicos.
   Puzles de resolución rápida para sesiones de juego satisfactorias.
   Controles intuitivos de arrastrar y soltar.
   Un puzle exclusivo para ti cada día con El Diario del Orden.
   Múltiples soluciones
   Preciosas ilustraciones.
   Música atmosférica.
   Un travieso (y precioso) gatito.
   Divertido y entretenido, ¡es estupendo para todas las edades!

Triez, empilez et organisez des objets du quotidien pour les placer au bon endroit. A Little to the Left est un jeu mêlant réflexion et rangement, où un chat espiègle prend un malin plaisir à mettre le bazar !
  
  
 
   Des casse-tête cachés parmi les objets du quotidien.
   Plusieurs solutions possibles pour une conception de casse-tête intuitive et satisfaisante.
   Un casse-tête personnalisé chaque jour avec l'Opération Rangement quotidien.
   Idéal pour les fans de jeux de réflexion occasionnels qui apprécient les espaces bien organisés.
   N'hésitez pas à passer des niveaux avec l'option « Lâcher l'affaire » et choisissez quand vous voudrez remettre un peu d'ordre dans tout ce souk.
   Besoin d'un indice ? Un peu ? Beaucoup ? Le système d'indices unique vous permet de contrôler la part de solution révélée dans chaque niveau.   
  
 
 Quelle heure les aiguilles de l'horloge doivent-elles indiquer ? Comment ranger les œufs ? Qui a collé toutes ces étiquettes sur ce fruit ?!?
 Venez découvrir un monde apaisant et bourré de surprises qu'offre ce jeu de réflexion et d'observation.
 Avec des illustrations charmantes et des scénarios surprenants, plus de 100 casse-tête exquis mettent au défi votre curiosité dans A Little to the Left. Gardez un œil sur un chat espiègle ayant un penchant pour le chaos !
 
  
  
 Dans le mode Rangement quotidien, nous vous proposons un casse-tête personnalisé CHAQUE JOUR avec des variations sur nos casse-tête préférés.
 Trouvez toutes les solutions chaque jour pour gagner des badges rigolos. Si seulement le ménage était aussi gratifiant dans la vraie vie !
  
  
 
 Envie de revivre l'ambiance des fêtes de fin d'année en juillet ? De vous faire une petite frayeur en mai ?
 A Little to the Left propose désormais un archivage de casse-tête, qui vous permet d'accéder en permanence aux niveaux saisonniers qui étaient auparavant limités dans le temps. Profitez désormais de la pagaille sur le thème de Noël, de Pâques, d'Halloween et plus encore, à tout moment dans l'année. CARACTÉRISTIQUES :   Plus de 100 casse-tête logiques uniques
   Des casse-tête rapides à résoudre pour un gameplay gratifiant
   Commandes intuitives de type glisser-déposer
   Un casse-tête personnalisé vous est proposé chaque jour avec l'Opération Rangement quotidien
   Plusieurs solutions
   Des illustrations charmantes
   Une conception sonore pleine de poésie
   Un chat espiègle (mais très mignon)
   Amusant et ludique, idéal pour les joueurs de 7 à 77 ans !

Sortiere, staple und organisiere Haushaltsgegenstände bei A Little to the Left, einem ordnungswütigen Puzzlespiel samt schlitzohriger Katze, die gerne Unfug macht!
 
  
 
   Puzzles verstecken sich unter Haushaltsgegenständen.
   Mehrere Lösungen sorgen für intuitive und spaßige Puzzles.
   "Das tägliche Aufräum-Abenteuer" liefert dir jeden Tag ein einzigartiges Puzzle.
   Perfekt für Gelegenheits-Puzzlefreunde und alle, denen ein gut organisierter Raum Freude bringt.
   Überspringe jederzeit Level, indem du "Let It Be" auswählst und selbst bestimmst, wann du welche Unordnung angehen möchtest.
   Brauchst du Hilfe? Etwas oder ganz viel? Durch ein einzigartiges System, wie Hinweise angezeigt werden, kannst du selbst kontrollieren, wieviel in jedem Level von der Lösung preisgegeben wird.  
  
 
 Wohin sollen die Uhrzeiger zeigen? Wie soll man die Eier anordnen? Wer hat so viele Aufkleber auf das Obst gepappt?!?
 Genieße eine beruhigende Welt mit einem Puzzlespiel für aufmerksame Beobachter, das hinter jeder Ecke Überraschungen versteckt.
 Mit bezaubernden Illustrationen und überraschenden Szenarien ist A Little to the Left ein befriedigendes Spiel für Neugierige mit über 100 entzückenden Puzzles, die es zu entdecken gilt. Achte auf die schlitzohrige Katze, die ein Pfötchen fürs Chaos hat!
 
  
 
 Im täglichen Aufräum-Abenteuer bekommst du JEDEN TAG ein Puzzle mit einer Variation eines unserer Lieblingspuzzles, das einzigartig für dich ist.
 Finde jeden Tag alle Lösungen und erhalte lustige Abzeichen! Wenn nur das Aufräumen im echten Leben so lohnend wäre.
  
  
 
 Möchtest du auch im Juli Weihnachtsstimmung aufkommen lassen? Oder hast du bereits im Mai Lust auf Halloween?
 In A Little to the Left gibt es jetzt ein Puzzlearchiv, mit dem du Zugriff auf die vorher zeitbegrenzten, saisonalen Levels hast. Ab jetzt kannst du dich auch am Chaos während der Weihnachtszeit, Ostern, Halloween und mehr erfreuen, egal welcher Monat gerade ist. FEATURES:   Über 100 einzigartige und logische Puzzles
   Schnell zu lösende Puzzles sorgen für ein zufriedenstellendes Spielerlebnis
   Intuitive Drag-and-Drop-Steuerung
   "Das tägliche Aufräum-Abenteuer" liefert dir jeden Tag ein für dich einzigartiges Puzzle
   Verschiedene Lösungswege
   Charmante Illustrationen
   Atmosphärisches Sounddesign
   Eine schlitzohrige (aber sehr niedliche) Katze
   Lustig und spannend, für jede Altersstufe geeignet!

Classifica, empilha e organiza objetos domésticos no sítio certo em A Little to the Left, um metódico jogo de arrumação com um gato maquiavélico que não vai deixar que te aborreças!
  
  
 
   Puzzles escondidos entre os objetos domésticos.
   Design de puzzles seja intuitivo e satisfatório com múltiplas maneiras de resolver os puzzles.
   Todos os dias há um puzzle único para ti com as Entregas Arrumadas Diárias (The Daily Tidy Delivery).
   Perfeito para jogadores ocasionais de jogos de puzzles e para aqueles que adoram ver espaços bem organizados.
   Salta níveis à vontade com a opção "Deixar Estar" e escolhe quando queres tratar de determinadas desarrumações
   Precisas de alguma dica? Precisas de muitas? Com um sistema único de dicas, és tu que controlas quanto da solução é revelada em cada nível.   
  
 
 Para que lado devem apontar os ponteiros do relógio? Como organizo os ovos? Quem colocou tantos autocolantes nesta peça de fruta?!?
 Vem desfrutar de um mundo relaxante com puzzles visuais, cheios de surpresas em cada esquina.
 Com ilustrações encantadoras e cenários surpreendentes, A Little to the Left resulta numa experiência curiosa e gratificante com mais de 100 agradáveis puzzles para descobrir. Fica atento ao gato maquiavélico com um gostinho para o caos!
  
  
 
 Nas Entregas Arrumadas, irás receber um puzzle TODOS OS DIAS, com variações dos nossos puzzles preferidos que seja único para ti.
 Encontra todas as soluções a cada dia para ganhar crachás divertidos! Se ao menos as arrumações fossem assim divertidas na vida real
  
  
 
 Queres um pouco de alegria em julho? Sentes-te um farrapo em maio?
 A Little to the Left tem agora um arquivo de puzzles que te dá acesso permanente a níveis sazonais, que eram previamente de tempo limitado. Podes agora desfrutar de desarrumações na altura do Natal, Páscoa, Halloween e muito mais! CARACTERÍSTICAS:   Mais de 100 puzzles de lógica únicos
   Puzzles fáceis de resolver para teres uma experiência satisfatória
   Controlos intuitivos para arrastar e soltar
   Um puzzle único todos os dias com as Entregas Arrumadas Diárias
   Várias soluções
   Ilustrações encantadoras
   Design de som envolvente
   Um gato maquiavélico, mas extremamente fofo
   Um jogo divertido, apropriado para todas as idades!

『A Little to the Left』は、飼い猫にちょっかいを出されながら、家のものを並べたり、積み上げたりして、ちょうどいい場所に整理整頓していくパズルゲームです。
  
  
 
   家のものの中に色々なパズルが隠れている。
   解決する方法は一つだけじゃない！ だからカンを頼りに、とても楽しくパズルを解くことができる。
   「デイリー・タイディー・デリバリー」で、毎日ユニークなパズルを楽しもう！
   お手軽なパズルゲームを楽しみたい人、整理整頓が大好きな人にうってつけ！
   「レット・イット・ビー」オプションでレベルのスキップが可能。どこを整頓したいか選択ができる！
   ユニークなヒントシステムで、各レベルのヒントの量をコントロール！  
  
 
 時計の針はどちらを指す？ 卵はどう並べよう？ フルーツにこんなにたくさんのシールを貼ったのは誰！？
 心落ち着く世界を堪能しながら、サプライズ満載の観察系パズルゲームを楽しみましょう。
 可愛らしいイラスト、予想を裏切るシナリオ、100個以上の楽しいパズルは大満足間違いなし。そうそう、いらずら好きな飼い猫のちょっかいには気をつけて！
  
  
 
 「デイリー・タイディー・デリバリー」モードは、毎日ユニークなパズルが配信されるシステム。
 楽しみながらバッジをゲットしちゃいましょう。ああ、本物の片付けもこれくらい楽しかったら...！
  
  
 
 7月にクリスマスを堪能したり、5月にハロウィンを楽しみたい時ってありますよね！
 追加された『A Little to the Left』のパズルアーカイブで、これまで期間限定だったシーズンレベルにいつでもアクセスが可能に。クリスマス、イースター、ハロウィンなどなど、季節に関係なくパズルを楽しんじゃいましょう！ 特徴：   100個以上のロジックパズル
   お手軽に進められるシンプルなゲーム
   直感的なドラッグ＆ドロップコントロール
   「デイリー・タイディー・デリバリー」で毎日ユニークなパズルをお届け
   解決方法は一つ以上
   キュートなイラスト
   素敵なサウンドデザイン
   いたずら好き（でもそこが可愛い！）猫
   年齢を問わずに楽しめる！

Sort, stack, and organize household objects into just the right spot in A Little to the Left, a tidy puzzle game with a mischievous cat who likes to shake things up!
  
  
 
   Puzzles hidden among household objects
   Multiple solutions make for intuitive and satisfying puzzle design
   A puzzle unique for you every day with The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Perfect for casual puzzle game fans and those who get a jolt of satisfaction from a well organized space
   Feel free to skip levels with the "Let It Be" option, and choose when you want to tackle certain messes
   Need a hint? A little or a lot? With a unique hint system, you control how much of the solution is revealed in each level.  
  
  
 Which way should the clock hands point? How to arrange the eggs? Who put so many stickers on this fruit?!?
 Come enjoy a calming world in an observational puzzle game with surprises around every corner.
 Featuring charming illustrations and surprising scenarios, A Little to the Left is satisfying and curious with over 100 delightful puzzles to discover. Keep your eye out for a mischievous cat who has an inclination for chaos!
  
  
 
 In the Daily Tidy mode, you’ll get a puzzle delivered EVERY DAY with variations on our favorite puzzles that’s unique to you.
 Find all the solutions each day to earn fun badges! If only tidying in real life was this rewarding.
 
  
  
 Want that festive joy in July? Feeling like a fright in May?
 A Little to the Left now features a puzzle Archive, granting permanent access to the formerly limited-time seasonal levels. Now enjoy messes based around Xmas, Easter, Halloween, and more, no matter the month. FEATURES:   Over 100 unique logical puzzles
   Quick-to-solve puzzles make for satisfying gameplay
   Intuitive drag and drop controls
   A puzzle unique to you delivered each day with The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Multiple solutions
   Charming illustration
   Atmospheric sound design
   A mischievous (but very cute) cat
   Funny and playful, great for all ages!

Recién actualizado      
 
 
  Acerca del juego ¡Clasifica, apila y organiza objetos del hogar en su lugar en A Little to the Left, un juego de puzles con un travieso gatito al que le gusta darte un poco de vidilla!
  
       
 
   Puzles escondidos entre objetos de la casa.
   Como tienen varias soluciones, su diseño es intuitivo y satisfactorio.
   Un puzle exclusivo para tu día a día con tu número de El Diario del Orden.
   Perfecto para los amantes de los puzles casuales y para quienes el orden les llena de satisfacción.
   Sáltate niveles libremente con la opción para dejarlo estar y elige cuándo quieres ocuparte de determinados desórdenes.
   ¿Necesitas una pista? ¿Grande o pequeña? Gracias al exclusivo sistema de pistas, controlas la cantidad de la solución que se revelará en cada nivel.   
       
 
 ¿En qué dirección deberían apuntar las manecillas del reloj? ¿Cómo ordenar los huevos? ¿¡A quién se le ocurrió ponerle tantas pegatinas a esta fruta!?
 Ven a disfrutar de un mundo relajante con un juego de puzles de observación y sorpresas a cada paso.
 Con preciosas ilustraciones y escenarios sorprendentes, A Little to the Left es un título satisfactorio e interesante con más de 100 puzles geniales para descubrir. ¡Y ojo con el travieso gatito, que tiende a sembrar el caos!
  
       
 
 CADA DÍA recibirás una versión de uno de tus puzles favoritos exclusiva para ti con tu edición de El Diario del Orden.
 ¡Encuentra todas las soluciones cada día para conseguir emblemas divertidos! Ojalá ordenar fuera así de gratificante en la vida real.
  
       
 
 ¿Quieres saltar de alegría en julio? ¿Mayo te agota?
 A Little to the Left ahora incluye un archivo de puzles con en el que podrás acceder de forma permanente a los niveles de temporada que antes tenían una duración limitada. Disfruta ya de los revoltijos de temática navideña, de Semana Santa, Halloween y más, sea el mes que sea. CARACTERÍSTICAS:   Más de 100 puzles lógicos únicos.
   Puzles de resolución rápida para sesiones de juego satisfactorias.
   Controles intuitivos de arrastrar y soltar.
   Un puzle exclusivo para ti cada día con El Diario del Orden.
   Múltiples soluciones
   Preciosas ilustraciones.
   Música atmosférica.
   Un travieso (y precioso) gatito.
   Divertido y entretenido, ¡es estupendo para todas las edades!

NETOP OPDATERET!      
 
 
  Om spillet Sortér, læg i bunker, og placér husholdningsgenstande på deres helt rigtige pladser i A Little to the Left, et fint lille hovedbrudsspil om en kat, der elsker at lave rav i den!
  
       
 
   Hovedbrud skjult blandt husholdningsgenstande
   Flere mulige løsninger gør hovedbruddene tilfredsstillende og intuitive.
   Et hovedbrud, der specielt til dig, med  The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Perfekt til hobbyspillere, der oplever stor tilfredsstillelse ved at opryddet værelse
   Spring over baner med "Let It Be"-funktionen, og vælg, hvornår du vil tackle specifikke former for rod
   Har du brug for et hint? Et stort eller lille? Med det unikke hintsystem bestemmer du selv, hvor lidt eller meget hjælp du skal have.   
       
 
 Hvilket retning skal viserne pege? Hvordan skal æggene arrangeres? Hvem har sat så mange klistermærker på frugten?!
 Kom og nyd en rolig verden i et hovedbrudsspil med overraskelser om hvert hjørne.
 Med charmerende illustrationer og overraskende scenarier er A Little to the Left et tilfredsstillende og spøjst spil med 100 vidunderlige hovedbrud at løse. Hold godt øje med den drilske kat, der elsker at lave ballade!
  
       
 
 I Daily Tidy-spiltypen får du tilsendt et hovedbrud HVER DAG, som er en unik version af vores bedste hovedbrud, lavet specielt til dig.
 Find alle løsningerne hver dag for at få sjove emblemer! Hvis bare oprydning var lige så tilfredsstillende i den virkelige verden.
  
       
 
 Vil du feste i juli? Gyse i maj?
 A Little to the Left indeholder nu et arkiv over hovedbrud, så du kan få adgang til tidligere tidsbegrænsede baner. Nu kan du nyde roderi med temaer som jul, påske, halloween og mange andre højtider, uanset årstiden. INDEHOLDER:   Over 100 unikke, logiske hovedbrud
   Lynhurtige hovedbrud som gør spillet tilfredsstillende
   Intuitiv træk og slip-styring
   Et skræddersyet hovedbrud til dig med The Daily Tidy Delivery
   Flere løsninger
   Charmernede illustrationer
   Stemningsfyldt lyddesign
   En drilsk (men meget legesyg) kat
   Sjovt og underholdende for alle aldre!

Appena aggiornato      
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Ordina, impila e organizza gli oggetti sistemandoli nel posto giusto in A Little to the Left, un gioco di rompicapo con un gatto birichino a cui piace movimentare le cose!
  
       
 
   Rompicapo nascosti tra gli oggetti domestici.
   La presenza di soluzioni multiple rende il design dei rompicapo intuitivo e soddisfacente.
   Un rompicapo unico al giorno grazie a L'Ordine Quotidiano.
   Perfetto per i giocatori occasionali appassionati di rompicapo e per gli amanti degli spazi ben organizzati e ordinati.
   Salta i livelli a tuo piacimento con l'opzione "Lascia stare" e scegli di volta in volta quali livelli riordinare.
   Ti serve un indizio? Te ne serve qualcuno in più? Grazie a un sistema di indizi completamente unico, sarai tu a scegliere quante informazioni rivelare sulla soluzione di ogni livello.   
       
 
 Da quale parte devono puntare le lancette dell'orologio? Come devo sistemare le uova? Chi ha messo tutte queste etichette su questo frutto?!?
 Goditi un'esperienza rilassante grazie a questo gioco di rompicapo basato sull'osservazione, con una sorpresa dove meno te lo aspetti.
 Con illustrazioni accattivanti, scenari sorprendenti e più di 100 rompicapo da scoprire, A Little to the Left è un gioco soddisfacente e curioso. Ma tieni d'occhio il gatto birichino, ama fare confusione!
  
       
 
 Con l'Ordine Quotidiano, riceverai OGNI GIORNO una nuova variante dei nostri rompicapo preferiti in esclusiva per te.
 Trova tutte le soluzioni ogni giorno per ottenere dei simpatici stemmi! Se solo mettere in ordine fosse così soddisfacente anche nella vita reale.
  
       
 
 Ti manca il clima festivo a luglio? O forse quello spaventoso a maggio?
 Da oggi, A Little to the Left dispone di un Archivio di rompicapo che permetterà di accedere permanentemente ai vecchi livelli stagionali a tempo limitato. Questo significa che potrai affrontare livelli incentrati sul Natale, sulla Pasqua, su Halloween e molte altre festività in qualsiasi momento dell'anno. CARATTERISTICHE:   Oltre 100 rompicapo unici basati sulla logica
   Rompicapo facilmente risolvibili per un'esperienza sempre soddisfacente
   Comandi intuitivi con cui prendere e trascinare oggetti
   Un nuovo rompicapo esclusivo ogni giorno con L'Ordine Quotidiano
   Soluzioni multiple
   Illustrazioni accattivanti
   Progettazione atmosferica del suono
   Un gatti dispettoso (e altrettanto adorabile)
   Divertente e coinvolgente, perfetto per tutte le età!

game.brief: A Little To The Left is a cozy puzzle game that has you sort, stack, and organize household items into pleasing arrangements while you keep an eye out for a mischievous cat with an inclination for chaos. Check out this playful and intuitive puzzler with 75+ satisfying messes to tidy.

game.title: Tomb Raider
game.description:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.

he game begins with Lara setting out on her first expedition aboard the ship Endurance, with the intention of finding the lost kingdom of Yamatai. By her suggestion and against Whitman's advice, the expedition ventures into the Dragon's Triangle, east of Japan. The ship is struck by a violent storm and shipwrecked, leaving the survivors stranded on an isolated island. Lara is separated from the others and captured by a strange, savage man. She manages to escape while her captor is killed as the cave collapses due to her actions. As Lara tries to locate the other survivors, she finds more evidence that the island is inhabited, such as strange carvings, dead bodies, and animal sacrifices. She eventually finds her friend Sam and a man called Mathias, who claims to be a teacher who was shipwrecked on the island. As Sam tells Mathias the legends of Himiko, Lara passes out; when she wakes, Mathias and Sam are nowhere in sight. When Lara regroups with the other survivors, Whitman decides to go with Lara and search for the still-missing Roth, while the rest of the group (Reyes, Jonah, Alex and Grim) set out to find Sam and Mathias. As Lara and Whitman explore, they discover that the island's inhabitants are worshipping Himiko, confirming that the island is Yamatai. Upon discovering a shrine erected in Himiko's name, they are captured by the islanders and taken to a settlement along with several other survivors from the Endurance. When the survivors attempt an escape, the captors turn on them. Lara is separated from Whitman and tries to hide, but is found by one of the islanders and forced to kill him. She fights off the remainder of the attackers and reunites with Roth, saving him from a wolf attack.

Lara manages to activate a radio tower and call for help, but the plane that answers the call is struck by a freak storm, and Lara hears a mysterious voice saying "No one leaves" in Japanese. Unable to save the surviving pilots, Lara is contacted by Alex and Reyes, who reveal that Sam has been kidnapped by the islanders, a violent cult known as the Solarii Brotherhood. Lara tries to rescue her, but is stopped by Mathias, leader of the Solarii, and ordered killed: she is saved by an attack from samurai-like Oni. Escaping the ancient monastery where she is taken by the Oni, she hears from Sam that Mathias is going to put her through the "Ascension", a "fire ritual" to find the next Sun Queen that will burn her to death if it is unsuccessful. Lara follows them to the Solarii fortress and is aided by Grim. The Solarii take Grim hostage, but he sacrifices himself so Lara can escape. With Roth's aid, Lara infiltrates the fortress and sees the ritual begin. When the fires are lit, a great wind blows them out, showing Sam to be the next Sun Queen. Lara escapes again and reunites with her friends, forming a plan to rescue Sam and escape. Aided by Whitman—who has managed to negotiate some degree of freedom with the Solarii—Lara returns to the palace to rescue Sam as Roth commandeers a helicopter to get them out. Lara succeeds, but persuades Sam to escape by land when she sees another storm gathering as the helicopter approaches. As Lara tries to force the helicopter pilot to land, they are brought down, with Lara nearly dying. Roth revives Lara, then takes a fatal blow from Mathias meant for Lara. While mourning Roth, Lara accepts that the storms are not natural, but are somehow connected to the Sun Queen and designed to prevent anyone from leaving the island. She meets up with the other survivors, who have evaded the Solarii long enough to secure a boat for escaping the island, provided that it can be repaired. They are joined by Whitman, who claims to have escaped, though Lara begins to suspect him of working with the cultists. Lara and Alex find parts for the boat in the wreck of the Endurance. They come under attack by the Solarii and Alex triggers an explosion, sacrificing himself so that Lara can escape with the tools.

Finding an account of a World War II-era Japanese military and Nazi scientific expedition to the island that sought a way to harness the storms as a weapon, Lara decides to explore a coastal tomb, where she finds the remains of a samurai general who committed seppuku. It is revealed in a message he left that he led the Queen's Stormguard, the Oni that defend the monastery, and that the Queen's successor took her own life rather than receive the Sun Queen's power. Lara realizes that the Ascension is not a ceremony to crown a new queen, but rather a ritual that transfers the original Sun Queen's soul into a new body; the Sun Queen had learned to become effectively immortal by transferring her soul into a young girl's body each time she grew old. The last priestess' suicide had interrupted the ritual, and left the Queen's soul trapped in her old decaying body, and Himiko's spirit has wanted to escape that corpse ever since. As a descendant of Yamatai, Sam is a viable candidate, and Mathias plans to offer Sam as a new host in exchange for his freedom. Lara returns to the survivors on the beach to find that Whitman has betrayed them, abducting Sam and handing her over to Mathias. Lara, Jonah and Reyes give chase, heading up a river to the monastery, with Lara arriving just in time to see Mathias trick Whitman into approaching and speaking to the Oni: the Oni kill Whitman. After fighting her way through both the Solarii and the Stormguard, Lara arrives at the top of the monastery where Mathias is performing the Ascension ritual. Lara fights her way to the central platform, and after a struggle, knocks Mathias off the platform to his death. Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

Reviews and Accolades    4.4/5 "...it delivers a must-play gaming experience for action adventure fans everywhere. Welcome back, Lara, you've been missed."  - Cheat Code Central 
  
   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+ 
  
   8.5/10 "I'm happy to go on record as saying this is the best Tomb Raider game I've played. Tightly produced, competent in both its puzzling and its combat, this is one reboot that manages to be unequivocally superior to its predecessors. "  - Destructoid
  
   4.5/10 "... if you're a gamer, you should play Tomb Raider. It combines high-levels of interactivity, excellent pacing, and a true bond between the player and the character on screen. "  - Game Revolution
  
   90/100 "Tomb Raider’s whole is greater than the sum of its parts, and everything combines to make this the best reboot game on the market today. "  - Game Over
 
 
  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider is a critically acclaimed action adventure that explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara, 8 multiplayer maps, and 4 characters.
 
  About the Game       
 
 Tomb Raider is a critically acclaimed action adventure that explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara.
 
  KEY FEATURES: 
   A Turning Point: Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story from a young woman to a hardened survivor.  
   An All-New Raiding Experience: Explore a mysterious island filled with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and tombs to discover.
   Fight to Live: Salvage resources, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants.
   Survive as a Team: Play a variety of multiplayer modes as Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider es una aventura de acción aclamada por la crítica que explora los orígenes de Lara Croft y su transformación, de joven inexperta a dura superviviente. Con su instinto como arma, Lara debe luchar para huir de una isla remota y descubrir su oscura historia. La edición Game of the Year incluye la Tumba del aventurero, 6 atuendos para el modo de un jugador, 8 mapas para el modo multijugador y 4 personajes.
 
  Acerca del juego       
 
 Tomb Raider es una aventura de acción aclamada por la crítica que explora la historia intensa y cruda del origen de Lara Croft y de cómo pasó de ser una joven ingenua a convertirse una sobreviviente curtida. Armada tan solo con sus instintos y su capacidad para llevar al límite la resistencia humana, Lara debe luchar para desentrañar el pasado oscuro de una isla olvidada y escapar de su implacable control. La Game of the Year Edition incluye la Tumba del Aventurero Perdido y 6 atuendos de un jugador para Lara.
 
  CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES: 
   Un momento decisivo: Sé testigo de la intensa historia del origen de Lara Croft y de su transformación de joven chica a endurecida superviviente.
   Una nueva experiencia en el saqueo de tumbas: Explora una misteriosa isla, en donde deberás resolver puzles, entablar batallas y descubrir tumbas.
   Lucha por sobrevivir: Salvaguarda recursos, gana experiencia y mejora las armas y herramientas de Lara para sobrevivir a los hostiles habitantes de la isla.
   Sobrevive en equipo: Ponte en el papel de los compañeros de barco de Lara o de los saqueadores Yamatai al jugar a una gran variedad de modalidades multi-jugador.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider est un jeu d'action-aventure acclamé par la critique narrant l'histoire sombre et intense des origines de Lara Croft, de son parcours de jeune femme à celui de survivante endurcie. Armée de son instinct de survie et de sa capacité à repousser les limites, Lara doit se battre pour dévoiler les mystères d'une île oubliée et s'échapper de son emprise. L’édition Jeu de l’année inclut le Tombeau de l’aventurier, 6 tenues pour Lara en mode solo, 8 cartes multijoueur et 4 personnages.
 
  À propos du jeu       
 
 Tomb Raider est un jeu d'action-aventure acclamé par la critique, qui explore les origines mouvementées de Lara Croft et son évolution, de jeune femme à survivante endurcie. Armée seulement de son instinct et de sa capacité à repousser les limites de l'endurance humaine, Lara doit lutter pour dévoiler l'histoire sombre d'une île oubliée et échapper à son emprise implacable. L'édition Game of the Year inclut Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 tenues pour Lara en jeu solo.
 
  CARACTÉRISTIQUES: 
   Un tournant : vivez aux côtés de Lara son passage de jeune femme en apparence fragile à combattante aguerrie.
   Explorez et pillez : partez à la découverte d'une île mystérieuse truffée de puzzles liés à l'environnement, de combats intenses et de tombes à piller.
   Combattez pour survivre : récupérez des matériaux, gagnez de l'expérience, et assurez la survie de Lara en milieu hostile en améliorant ses armes et ses outils.
   Survivre ensemble : différents modes multijoueurs sont disponibles, dans lesquels vous pourrez incarner un membre de l'équipage de l'Endurance ou l'un des pilleurs de Yamatai.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Das von der Kritik gefeierte Action-Adventure Tomb Raider erzählt die düstere und packende Vorgeschichte der Wandlung Lara Crofts von einer jungen Frau zur harten Überlebenskünstlerin. Nur mit ihrem Instinkt und übermenschlicher Ausdauer bewaffnet, deckt Lara die dunkle Vergangenheit einer vergessenen Insel auf, um ihrem gnadenlosen Griff zu entkommen. Die „Game of the Year“-Edition enthält „Das Grab des Abenteurers“, sechs Single Player-Outfits für Lara, 8 Multiplayer-Karten und 4 Charaktere.
 
  Infos zum Spiel       
 
 Tomb Raider ist ein erfolgreiches Action-Adventure, das die faszinierende Hintergrundgeschichte von Lara Croft ergründet und veranschaulicht, wie aus einer jungen Frau eine kampferprobte Überlebende wurde. Lara kann sich nur auf ihre Instinkte und ihre übermenschliche Ausdauer verlassen und muss die finstere Geschichte einer vergessenen Insel enthüllen, um sich aus ihrem eisernen Griff zu befreien. Die „Spiel des Jahres“-Ausgabe enthält „Das Grab des verschollenen Abenteurers“ und 6 Einzelspieler-Outfits für Lara.
 
  SCHLÜSSELELEMENTE: 
   Wendepunkt: Erlebe Lara Crofts aufregende Anfänge und ihre Entwicklung zur knallharten Überlebenskünstlerin.
   Völlig neue Erlebnisse auf Streifzügen: Erforsche eine mysteriöse Insel voll von Umgebungsrätseln, Kämpfen und Gräbern, die es zu entdecken gilt.
   Kämpfe, um zu überleben: Berge Ressourcen, sammle Erfahrung und verbessere Laras Waffen und Werkzeuge, um gegen die feindlich gesinnten Bewohner der Insel zu bestehen.
   Im Team überleben: Spiele in einer Vielzahl von Mehrspieler-Modi Laras Schiffskameraden oder Plünderer Yamatais.

Reviews and Accolades    4.4/5 "...it delivers a must-play gaming experience for action adventure fans everywhere. Welcome back, Lara, you've been missed."  - Cheat Code Central 
  
   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+ 
  
   8.5/10 "I'm happy to go on record as saying this is the best Tomb Raider game I've played. Tightly produced, competent in both its puzzling and its combat, this is one reboot that manages to be unequivocally superior to its predecessors. "  - Destructoid

  Acerca do jogo

Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. The Game of the Year edition includes the Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 single player outfits for Lara.
 
  KEY FEATURES: 
   A Turning Point: Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story from a young woman to a hardened survivor.  
   An All-New Raiding Experience: Explore a mysterious island filled with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and tombs to discover.
   Fight to Live: Salvage resources, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants.
   Survive as a Team: Play a variety of multiplayer modes as Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

Reviews and Accolades    4.4/5 "...it delivers a must-play gaming experience for action adventure fans everywhere. Welcome back, Lara, you've been missed."  - Cheat Code Central 
  
   4.5/5 "...Tomb Raider is sure to impress. Its expert sense of pacing, captivating setting, and dark tone create a truly memorable experience that's further enhanced by an immense level of detail."  - gamesradar+ 
  
   8.5/10 "I'm happy to go on record as saying this is the best Tomb Raider game I've played. Tightly produced, competent in both its puzzling and its combat, this is one reboot that manages to be unequivocally superior to its predecessors. "  - Destructoid
  
   4.5/10 "... if you're a gamer, you should play Tomb Raider. It combines high-levels of interactivity, excellent pacing, and a true bond between the player and the character on screen. "  - Game Revolution
  
   90/100 "Tomb Raider’s whole is greater than the sum of its parts, and everything combines to make this the best reboot game on the market today. "  - Game Over
